popularStory.headline: William Lovelace (1527 - 1577)
popularStory.description:
William LOVELACE was born about 1527.

He signed a will on 21 Mar 1577.

He died on 23 Mar 1577.

He was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, England.

Suceeded his father as proprietor of Lovelace …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Lovelace III於1525年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親Sir William Lovelace II45歲，母親Alice Mae Stevens Shawe25歲。他於1555年與Anne Lewis在英國肯特貝黑斯達結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1577年4月23日在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Lovelace III于1525年出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲Sir William Lovelace II45岁，母亲Alice Mae Stevens Shawe25岁。他于1555年与Anne Lewis在英国肯特貝黑斯達结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1577年4月23日在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lovelace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Loveless  . The spelling is apparently theresult of folk etymology, which understood the word as a nickname fora dandy fond of lace. The modern sense of this word is, however, notattested until the 16th century and at the time of surname formationit meant only ‘cord’ or ‘shoelace’.

variants.name: Loveless
meanings: nickname from Middle English loveles ‘loveless, without love’, probably in the sense ‘fancy free’.
some early examples, such as Richard Lovelas (Kent 1344), may have as their second element Middle English las(se) ‘girl’, ‘maiden’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William Lovelace III was born in 1525, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Lovelace II, was 45 and his mother, Alice Mae Stevens Shawe, was 25. He married Anne Lewis in 1555, in Bethersden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 April 1577, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Lovelace III est né en 1525, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Lovelace II, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice Mae Stevens Shawe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne Lewis en 1555, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1577, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Lovelace III 1525 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Lovelace II 45 und seine Mutter Alice Mae Stevens Shawe 25. Er hat 1555 in Bethersden, Kent, England Anne Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1577 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Lovelace III è nato il nel 1525 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Lovelace II, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Alice Mae Stevens Shawe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anne Lewis nel 1555, nel Bethersden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1577, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Lovelace IIIが1525年にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir William Lovelace IIは45歳，母Alice Mae Stevens Shaweは25歳であった。1555年にイギリスケントベスエルスデンでAnne Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1577年4月23日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリー カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Lovelace III(이)가 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Lovelace II(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Mae Stevens Shawe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1555년 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 Anne Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 4월 23일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Lovelace III nasceu em 1525, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Lovelace II, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice Mae Stevens Shawe, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Lewis em 1555, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1577, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Lovelace III родился в 1525 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Lovelace II было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Mae Stevens Shawe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Lewis в 1555 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 апреля 1577 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Anne Lewis en 1555, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1577, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
